games.name: Christmas Mahjong 2019
games.description:
Step into the festive world of Christmas Mahjong 2019 where holiday cheer meets classic puzzle-solving fun! In this enchanting game, your objective is to match and eliminate pairs of Christmas-themed Mahjong tiles from the board. Each tile features delightful seasonal imagery, making your gameplay experience both visually appealing and entertaining. To successfully remove tiles, you must ensure they're 'free,' meaning they aren t blocked by other tiles and have at least one side (left or right) unobstructed.

Prepare yourself for an exciting challenge across 25 unique levels! As you progress, the difficulty will increase, requiring you to think critically and strategize your moves. Each level offers fresh challenges, so you can enjoy the game as many times as you wish, with different layouts and combinations waiting to be discovered. Aim to clear the tiles in the least amount of time possible to improve your skills and score higher!

The delightful atmosphere and engaging gameplay make Christmas Mahjong 2019 a perfect way to celebrate the holiday season while enhancing your cognitive abilities. Whether you're a seasoned Mahjong player or a newcomer, this game is designed to bring joy and fun to players of all ages. Gather your friends and family, cheer each other on, and see who can complete the levels fastest!

How to play free Christmas Mahjong 2019 game online

To play Christmas Mahjong 2019, click on any free tile that matches another to remove them from the board. Remember, a tile is considered free only if it's not covered by another tile and has at least one unobstructed side. Create pairs strategically to clear the board within the time limit!
games.instructions: Use mouse to play this html5 mahjong games

games.name: Cursed Treasure
games.description:
Cursed Treasure is a captivating HTML5 interpretation of the classic tower defense genre, designed to deliver a thrilling experience on mobile devices. In this game, you're thrust into the role of a merciless Overlord, charged with the daunting task of safeguarding your precious gems from the grasp of seemingly heroic invaders. These good heroes come to swipe your gems, and it s your duty to rally the forces of darkness at your disposal to protect your treasure.

With an army composed of fierce orcs, relentless undead, and powerful demons, you can strategically position various defenses across the battlefield. Your primary objective is clear: annihilate all heroes trying to pilfer your valuables. Each hero possesses unique abilities and strengths, making it essential to assess your defenses carefully and devise a cunning strategy. As you progress through levels filled with diverse environments and increasing challenges, you ll unlock more powerful abilities and upgrades to enhance your minions' effectiveness against invading forces.

The engaging graphics and intuitive interface make diving into Cursed Treasure not only easy but incredibly enjoyable for gamers of all ages. Prepare to experience an exhilarating twist on the tower defense game mechanics as you embrace your dark side and protect what s rightfully yours. Remember, the mantra of the Overlord is simple but profound: Don t Touch My Gems!

How to play free Cursed Treasure game online

To play Cursed Treasure online, start by selecting your desired level. Place your units strategically around the map to block and eliminate enemy heroes. As you defeat foes, collect gems and upgrade your defenses for higher impact. Keep track of the heroes paths and adjust your strategy to ensure maximum protection for your gems.

As you hold your finger on the screen, the stick will begin to stretch. The key to success is to gauge the length of the stick accurately; if it falls short, your stick soldier will plummet to the ground. This simple yet captivating concept will have you hooked as you try to navigate an increasingly complex series of platforms.

The platforms vary in height and distance, creating an exhilarating challenge that requires keen timing and quick decision-making skills. As players progress, the pace of the game intensifies, and the platforms become more scattered, making it necessary to stretch the stick with greater precision. Every fall teaches you about the stick's limits, forcing you to improve your timing and strategy with each attempt. Stick Soldier offers a fun and addictive gameplay experience that appeals to players of all ages, providing endless opportunities for practice and improvement.

How to play free Stick Soldier game online

To play Stick Soldier, simply touch and hold the screen to grow the stick. Release your finger when you feel the stick is long enough to reach the next platform. If your stick isn t long enough, you will fall, so aim to stretch it just the right amount to successfully cross each gap. Happy gaming!
games.instructions: click or touch screen to play

games.name: Pixelkenstein : Merry Merry Christmas

Your goal is to outshine other players in a competition to collect the most gifts. With each present you gather, you contribute to bringing joy to children everywhere. The game's vibrant graphics and captivating soundtrack create an immersive experience that captures the essence of Christmas spirit. Not only will you enjoy the thrill of gathering gifts, but you'll also experience the joy of spreading holiday cheer in this fun-filled game.

As you journey through the winter wonderland, watch out for special power-ups that can help you speed up your collection efforts or safeguard you against obstacles. games.name: Offroad Trucks Differences
games.description:
Offroad Trucks Differences is an engaging puzzle game that focuses on finding variations between images of offroad trucks. This captivating game consists of ten distinct levels, each presenting a pair of images featuring rugged offroad vehicles. Your challenge is to identify seven subtle differences within these images, testing not only your observational skills but also your ability to work under pressure.

As you embark on this colorful journey, you will have a limited time of 120 seconds for each level, which adds an exciting layer of urgency and competition. Don't be fooled by the bright and lively visuals; while the game isn't exceptionally challenging, it can still keep you on your toes as you race against the clock. Each level you complete brings you one step closer to becoming a master of spotting differences!

The soundtrack of the game complements the visuals perfectly, providing a relaxed ambiance that allows you to focus and enjoy the experience. With vibrant colors and natural landscapes featuring offroad trucks, players will find themselves immersed in each scene, making the task of finding differences both fun and visually pleasing. Are you ready to conquer all levels and prove your skills?

How to play free Offroad Trucks Differences game online

To play Offroad Trucks Differences, simply start the game and select a level. Once the images appear, carefully examine both images and click on the areas where you notice differences. Keep an eye on the timer and try to find all seven differences before your time runs out. Enjoy the adventure!

games.name: Jago
games.description:
Welcome to Jago, an engaging and addictive game that challenges your precision and timing! The objective is simple: you must stretch a stick by holding down your finger on the screen. As you drag your finger, the stick grows longer, allowing you to traverse various platforms. The real challenge lies in mastering the length of the stick; if it's too short, you won't make the jump, and if it's too long, you risk overshooting and falling off the edges of the platforms.

In Jago, you'll navigate through a series of intriguing levels, each designed to test your skills and reflexes. With vibrant graphics and smooth animations, you'll find yourself immersed in the gameplay as you strategically gauge how long the stick should be. Pay close attention to the distance between platforms and adjust the stick accordingly to make successful leaps. Careful control is key one wrong move can lead to a tumble and a game over.

As you progress through the game, you ll encounter increasingly challenging scenarios that require not just quick reactions, but also sharp judgment. Will you be able to conquer every level and master the art of the perfect stick length? Dive into this exhilarating experience today, and see how far you can go!

How to play free Jago game online

To play Jago, simply hold your finger on the screen to extend the stick. Release your finger at the right moment to drop the stick onto the next platform. Adjust the length based on the distance to ensure successful landings. Keep practicing to improve your timing and accuracy!
games.instructions: Mouse

games.name: Tetriz Match 3
games.description:
Welcome to Tetriz Match 3, a delightful puzzle adventure where you can indulge your love for candies! In this exciting game, your objective is to skillfully shuffle and shift the falling groups of colorful candies to create matches. Form a line of three or more identical candies they can be arranged horizontally, vertically, or even diagonally anywhere on the board. The more combinations you make, the higher your score!

Utilize the left and right arrow keys to expertly shift the falling candies. When you want to change their position in a new formation, simply press the up arrow key to shuffle them. The key to mastering Tetriz Match 3 is quick thinking and strategic moves, so you can prevent the board from filling up to the upper row. Keep an eye on the falling candies and think ahead to make the best possible matches!

With each successful match, you not only earn points but also clear space on the board for new candies to fall. The game continues until the board is completely filled, so stay sharp and play smart to achieve the highest score possible!

How to play free Tetriz Match 3 game online

To play Tetriz Match 3, use the left and right arrow keys to shift candies along the rows and the up arrow key to shuffle the falling group. Create lines of three or more identical candies to score points while ensuring that the board doesn t reach the top. Have fun and strategize!
games.instructions: Use buttons with mouse or touch or keyboard Arrow keys to play this game

games.name: Slap Contest
games.description:
Welcome to the thrilling world of the Slap Contest Game, where fun and competition collide! In this exciting multiplayer game, you'll step into the ring with your opponent, testing your reflexes and quick thinking as you try to deliver the perfect slap. The objective is simple: maneuver your character left and right while rapidly tapping to unleash slaps on your adversary. Connect three slaps to earn your victory and advance to the next stage. The adrenaline rush and laughter are guaranteed as you witness the hilarious reactions of the characters during the events!

One of the standout features of the Slap Contest Game is its fantastic 2P mode, which allows you to challenge your friends and family to epic smackdowns. Gather your loved ones, choose your characters, and see who can become the ultimate slap champion! The straightforward controls and engaging gameplay make it easy for anyone to join in on the fun, regardless of their gaming experience.

As you progress through different levels, the challenges will increase, adding more excitement to the gameplay. Each slap delivered adds to the thrill, and the dynamic environment keeps you on your toes. So, are you ready to test your skills and prove that you're the reigning slap king or queen? Join the Slap Contest today and prepare for some amusing moments and friendly rivalry!

How to play free Slap Contest game online

To play Slap Contest, use the left and right movement controls to dodge and position yourself strategically. Double-tap the screen to deliver slaps to your opponent. Accumulate three successful slaps to win the round and progress through the levels. Enjoy friendly competition and laughter in 2P mode with friends!

games.name: Cinderella Dress Designer

Step into the whimsical world of fairy tales with "Cinderella Dress Designer"! As Cinderella prepares to enchant Prince Charming at the grand ball, she requires an enchanting transformation at a chic beauty salon made just for princesses, fairies, and brides-to-be. games.name: Dolphin Life
games.description:
Embark on an unforgettable aquatic adventure in "Dolphin Life," where you take on the role of a lively dolphin navigating through an ocean filled with debris and pollution. Your mission is simple yet exhilarating: survive as long as you can while dodging various items like banana peels, oil barrels, and aluminum cans that invade your underwater habitat.

As you swim through the vibrant blue waters, you ll encounter a mix of hazards that threaten your well-being. With each passing moment, the challenge intensifies, pushing you to hone your reflexes and adapt your strategy. The game not only provides a fun and engaging experience but also raises awareness about the impact of garbage on marine life. Your performance is measured by how long you can keep your dolphin safe from the litter that has found its way into your home. Can you become the ultimate champion of the ocean?

Immerse yourself in this captivating environment, where the serenity of underwater life meets the urgent need to protect it from human negligence. Feel the thrill of dodging obstacles while appreciating the beauty of aquatic ecosystems. Join other players around the world and gauge how your survival skills stack up against theirs. Enjoy the harmonious blend of entertainment and environmental consciousness in "Dolphin Life!"

How to play free Dolphin Life game online

To play "Dolphin Life," simply use your mouse or keyboard to steer your dolphin and navigate through the water. Avoid the floating garbage items by moving swiftly and strategically. Try to collect any items that may boost your survival while staying clear of harmful debris. Compete for the highest score and have fun!
